task_completion.description: Verify that Wi-Fi or network connectivity is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Quick settings panel showing Wi-Fi turned off, Airplane mode turned on, or the status bar lacking a Wi-Fi/data connection icon.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Flight Crew View app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flight Crew View application interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent attempts to search for flight 'UA 100'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'UA 100' is entered into a search bar or flight query field within the Flight Crew View app.

task_completion.description: Verify that an offline error or loading state is displayed in the app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An error message, 'no internet' warning, failed connection dialog, or infinite loading spinner is visible in the Flight Crew View app after the search attempt.

task_completion.description: Verify that a report documenting the error is created at /sdcard/offline_test_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal screen showing the creation or editing of a file named 'offline_test_report.txt' containing words describing the offline state (e.g., 'error', 'network', 'offline', 'fail').

task_completion.description: Verify that device network connectivity is restored before completion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Quick settings panel showing Wi-Fi turned back on, or the status bar showing an active Wi-Fi connection icon in the final screenshots.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Flight Crew View app to observe the error.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Flight Crew View app interface with the 'UA 100' search and the resulting error, proving the agent didn't just guess the error without opening the app.

integrity.description: Ensure the report content reflects the actual observed app behavior.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the offline_test_report.txt should describe the specific error or behavior seen in the app screenshots, rather than a generic pre-programmed response.

integrity.description: Ensure Wi-Fi was toggled using standard Android UI methods.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of the Android Quick Settings drop-down or the Android Settings app being used to toggle Wi-Fi or Airplane mode, rather than relying solely on hidden terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target report path is exactly '/sdcard/offline_test_report.txt'. The required flight query is 'UA 100'. The report must contain at least one of the following keywords to be considered valid: error, network, connect, fail, offline, internet, loading, spin.
